JOIN frpm ON schools.cdscode = frpm.cdscode
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.county = 'San Diego' AND schools.magnet = 0.0 AND schools.statustype = 'Active' AND schools.virtual = 'N' AND schools.eilname = 'High School' AND schools.admemail1 = 'khedrick@guhsd.net' AND schools.edopsname = 'Traditional'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which schools entities with county equal to 'San Diego' and magnet equal to '0.0' and statustype equal to 'Active' and virtual equal to 'N' and eilname equal to 'High School' and admemail1 equal to 'khedrick@guhsd.net' and edopsname equal to 'Traditional', having at least one related frpm record (linked on schools.cdscode = frpm.cdscode), having at least one related satscores record (linked on schools.cdscode = satscores.cds)?

qa_pairs.question: Which schools in Paramount have the address 15110 California Avenue, phone number (562) 602-6000, website www.paramount.k12.ca.us, and belong to Paramount Unified with 459 test takers and 1319 enrolled in 2012?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.cdscode = frpm.cdscode
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE satscores.dname = 'Paramount Unified' AND schools.street = '15110 California Avenue' AND satscores.numtsttakr = 459 AND schools.website = 'www.paramount.k12.ca.us' AND satscores.enroll12 = 1319 AND schools.city = 'Paramount' AND schools.phone = '(562) 602-6000'

qa_pairs.question: Which K-12 public schools in CA have the name Keyes to Learning Charter, are located at PO Box 519 with zip 95328 and latitude 37.552793, have magnet status 0.0, and have SAT scores with rtype S?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.cdscode = frpm.cdscode
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.soctype = 'K-12 Schools (Public)' AND satscores.rtype = 'S' AND schools.zip = '95328' AND schools.mailstreet = 'PO Box 519' AND schools.latitude = 37.552793 AND schools.state = 'CA' AND schools.magnet = 0.0 AND schools.school = 'Keyes to Learning Charter'

qa_pairs.question: What schools in CA where edopsname is Traditional, with administrator last name Ross, located exactly at 11330 West Graham Pl., B-9, zip 90064, and longitude -118.43558, had updates on or before 2016-10-07?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.cdscode = frpm.cdscode
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.lastupdate <= '2016-10-07' AND schools.zip = '90064' AND schools.streetabr = '11330 West Graham Pl., B-9' AND schools.edopsname = 'Traditional' AND schools.longitude = -118.43558 AND schools.state = 'CA' AND schools.admlname1 = 'Ross'

JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
